ul.li: 🔴 Red: Process A / Current Running / TSS

ol.li: Kernel processes A, B, C share kernel page directory
User process has isolated page directory
TSS.ESP0 updated on every context switch

text.tspan: │ A A A A A A A A A A A A A A │ ← Process A (RED)
│ B B B B B B B B B B B B B B │ ← Process B (GREEN)
│ C C C C C C C C C C C C C C │ ← Process C (BLUE)
Used by: Process A, B, C

div.p: Physical Address Size Purpose ───────────────────────────────────────── 0x00000000-0x000FFFFF 1MB Reserved (BIOS, VGA) 0x00100000-0x001XXXXX ~XXX Kernel binary 0x001YYYYY-0x001ZZZZZ 128KB PMM bitmap 0x00200000-0x002FFFFF 1MB Free (available) 0x00300000-0x00300FFF 4KB User Page Directory ★ 0x00301000-0x003FFFFF ~1MB Free (available) ... More free frames
0x00000000-0xBFFFFFFF User space (per-process) 0xC0000000-0xC03FFFFF Kernel identity map (4MB) 0xC0400000-0xC1400000 Kernel heap (16MB max)
